delete.description: Handles DELETE requests to delete account with cascading cleanup.

get.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve account info.

patch.description: Handles PATCH requests to update account info.

schema.description: Fields that can be updated on an account.

email.description: Email address associated with the account.

meta.description: Account metadata merged into the stored account metadata payload.

preferences.description: Flat account preferences map keyed by dot-notation paths.

schema.description: Parameters for creating an API key.

surface.description: Where the credential is intended to be used.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

note.description: Optional note describing how the API key is used.

schema.description: Mutable API key fields.

name.description: Updated display name for the API key.

note.description: Updated note for the API key. Set to `null` to clear it.

schema.description: Event emitted by a caller into the authenticated organization's event stream.

event.description: Event name, e.g. user.signed_up or Machine Started.

properties.description: Event properties, equivalent to Segment properties or PostHog properties.

context.description: Caller/environment context such as page, library, IP metadata, or app version.

public_ipv6.description: The public IPv6 address assigned to the sandbox.

private_ipv4.description: The private IPv4 address inside the host network.

oneOf.description: Secret id containing the machine SSH private key.

value.description: Masked by default. Present as a private key only when a create/reveal response explicitly returns it.

public_address.description: The public IPv6 address for direct network access.

ssh_key.description: Private SSH key returned only when explicitly revealed.

schema.description: Invite one or more email addresses into an organization.

organization.description: Organization identifier that the invited users will join.

emails.description: Email addresses that should receive membership invitations.

get.description:
List memberships based on query parameters:
        - If organization_id is provided, list all memberships for that organization
        - Otherwise, list all memberships for the authenticated user

schema.description: Fields used to create a new organization.

name.description: Human-readable organization name. When omitted, the generated identifier falls back to `new`.

settings.description: Organization settings used by platform settings pages.

meta.description: Open-ended metadata stored alongside the organization.

get.description: List organizations for the authenticated user.

schema.description: Mutable organization fields.

settings.description: Organization settings used by platform settings pages.

meta.description: Open-ended metadata stored alongside the organization.

schema.description: Fields used to create a secret.

value.description: Secret value to encrypt and store. Returned only by dedicated reveal flows, not by list or retrieve.

data.description: Arbitrary structured data stored with the secret.

meta.description: Additional metadata stored with the secret.

get.description: List secrets for the authenticated user's organization.

schema.description: Mutable secret fields.

value.description: Secret value to encrypt and store. Returned only by dedicated reveal flows, not by list or retrieve.

data.description: Arbitrary structured data stored with the secret.

meta.description: Additional metadata stored with the secret.

get.description: List usage statements with filtering and pagination.
Retrieve a specific statement by ID, creating it if it doesn't exist.

post.description: Add to balance - creates Stripe checkout for one-time payment.

schema.description: Hosted checkout session for a one-time prepaid credit top-up.

amount.description: Top-up amount in whole USD dollars.

schema.description: One-time balance top-up request.

amount.description: Top-up amount in whole USD dollars.

post.description: Create a hosted checkout intent for a subscription tier.

schema.description: Hosted Stripe Checkout session for starting a subscription tier.

url.description: Checkout URL to redirect the customer to.

status.description: Checkout state for the returned session.

schema.description: Optional tier selection when creating a subscription checkout session.

tier.description: Subscription tier to start checkout for.

get.description: List active subscriptions for the authenticated organization.

post.description: Downgrade subscription tier (scheduled at period end).

schema.description: Result of a subscription tier change request.
Target tier for an upgrade or downgrade request.

tier.description: Tier that the subscription should move to.

post.description: Create Stripe billing portal session for managing subscription.

schema.description: Hosted Stripe Billing Portal session.

url.description: Billing portal URL to redirect the customer to.

schema.description: Result of a subscription tier change request.
Target tier for an upgrade or downgrade request.

tier.description: Tier that the subscription should move to.

schema.description: Fields used to create an outbound webhook endpoint.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint that will receive signed event payloads.

enabled_events.description: Event names delivered to this webhook. Use ["*"] to receive all emitted events.

description.description: Optional human-readable description for the endpoint.

data.description: Optional arbitrary structured data stored with the webhook.

meta.description: Optional metadata stored with the webhook.

x-layerbrain-websocket.description: Stream webhook events for the authenticated organization over WebSocket.

post.summary: Create or reuse a CLI listen webhook endpoint

schema.description: Create or reuse the webhook endpoint used by the CLI listen command.

url.description: Local URL that CLI-forwarded events will be delivered to.

enabled_events.description: Event names delivered to this webhook. Use ["*"] to receive all emitted events.

schema.description: Mutable webhook fields.

url.description: Updated HTTPS endpoint for webhook delivery.

enabled_events.description: Event names delivered to this webhook. Use ["*"] to receive all emitted events.

status.description: Enabled or disabled state for the endpoint.

data.description: Updated arbitrary structured data stored with the webhook.

meta.description: Updated metadata stored with the webhook.
